label: 1534 CE
era_summary: Year 1534 (MDXXXIV) was a common year starting on Thursday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1534: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1534: Spain-Yucatan, 1531-35; Spain-Turkey, 1532-35; Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563. Maddison records GDP/capita 1499 (ESP, 1534) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
